Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 90 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 85 upvotes, 8 comments
  3. TruffleRuby 46 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 386 upvotes, 80 comments
  5. Learn Something Old Every Day, Part XVIII: How Does FPU Detection Work? 28 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. Ministack (Replacement for LocalStack) 151 upvotes, 30 comments
  7. GitHub's Historic Uptime 415 upvotes, 105 comments
  8. 4D Doom 141 upvotes, 30 comments
  9. Back to FreeBSD – Part 2 – Jails 52 upvotes, 9 comments
  10. Nematophagous Fungus 39 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 120 upvotes, 30 comments
  12. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 89 upvotes, 22 comments
  13. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 82 upvotes, 21 comments
  14. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 296 upvotes, 97 comments
  15. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 163 upvotes, 53 comments
  16. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1785 upvotes, 725 comments
  17. Ordinary Lab Gloves May Have Skewed Microplastic Data 65 upvotes, 17 comments
  18. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 174 upvotes, 58 comments
  19. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 870 upvotes, 354 comments
  20. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 105 upvotes, 34 comments
  21. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. We intercepted the White House app's traffic. 77% of requests go to 3rd parties 54 upvotes, 15 comments
  23. U.S. exempts oil industry from protecting Gulf animals, for 'national security' 120 upvotes, 45 comments
  24. Inside the 'self-driving' lab revolution 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 122 upvotes, 54 comments
  26. I Traced My Traffic Through a Home Tailscale Exit Node 84 upvotes, 39 comments
  27. My son pleasured himself on Gemini Live. Entire family's Google accounts banned 30 upvotes, 11 comments
  28. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 348 upvotes, 299 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 187 upvotes, 336 comments
  30. Why the US Navy won't blast the Iranians and 'open' Strait of Hormuz 200 upvotes, 529 comments

Last generated 11:00am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
